sentences.sentence: Honeybees are characterised by their ability to produce liquefied sugar (honey) and a propensity to construct colonial nests using wax, two tasks that necessitate a significant level of social integration among members.
sentences.translation: 蜜蜂的特点是能够制造液态糖（蜂蜜），并倾向于用蜂蜡建造群体巢穴；这两项任务都需要群体成员之间高度的社会协作。

structure.text: Honeybees
are characterised by their ability to produce liquefied sugar (honey) and a propensity to construct colonial nests using wax
using wax
two tasks
that necessitate a significant level of social integration among members

difficult_points: ability 和 propensity 由 and 并列，分别带不定式说明能力与倾向的内容。
two tasks 与前述两项行为同位，that 从句修饰 tasks。
using wax 是现在分词短语，说明建巢所用材料。

sentences.sentence: As a result, they maintain strict divisions of labour, based on sex, with all males functioning as drones to fertilize and care for the eggs, and all females, with the exception of the single fertile queen, responsible for fetching nectar for the colony's progeny.
sentences.translation: 因此，蜜蜂按照性别维持严格的劳动分工：所有雄蜂都作为工蜂群中的雄蜂负责使卵受精并照料卵；除唯一具有生育能力的蜂王外，所有雌蜂都负责为蜂群后代采集花蜜。

structure.text: they maintain strict divisions of labour
based on sex
with all males functioning as drones to fertilize and care for the eggs
and all females, with the exception of the single fertile queen, responsible for fetching nectar for the colony's progeny
with the exception of the single fertile queen

difficult_points: based on sex 后置说明劳动分工的依据。
两个 with 复合结构分别说明雄性与雌性的职责；第二项省略与前项平行的 with。
原文把雄蜂职责写为 fertilize and care for the eggs，虽与常见蜂群知识可能不符，必须原样保留并按句面翻译。

sentences.sentence: In addition, honeybees have devised a sophisticated system of communication to relay important information from member to member.
sentences.translation: 此外，蜜蜂还发展出一套复杂的交流系统，用于在成员之间传递重要信息。

structure.text: honeybees
have devised a sophisticated system of communication
to relay important information from member to member

difficult_points: have devised 使用现在完成时，强调这一系统已经形成并延续。
to relay ... 表示交流系统的目的；from member to member 表示成员间逐个传递。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps the most intriguing feature of honeybee communication is a series of flight moves only performed by a female worker bee that has returned to the nest with nectar and needs to tell the rest of her colony that she has discovered food supplies and where they can be found.
sentences.translation: 蜜蜂交流中最引人入胜的特征，或许是一连串飞行动作；这些动作只由携带花蜜返回蜂巢的雌性工蜂完成，她需要告诉蜂群中的其他成员，自己发现了食物，以及在哪里能找到它们。

structure.text: the most intriguing feature of honeybee communication
is a series of flight moves
only performed by a female worker bee
that has returned to the nest with nectar and needs to tell the rest of her colony
that she has discovered food supplies and where they can be found

difficult_points: performed by ... 修饰 flight moves；that has returned ... 修饰 female worker bee。
has returned 和 needs 是定语从句中的并列谓语。
tell 后并列 that 陈述从句与 where 疑问从句；they 指 food supplies。

expressions.text: return to the nest with nectar

sentences.sentence: This so-called honeybee dance was first interpreted by German zoologist Karl von Frisch in the early 1970s.
sentences.translation: 这种所谓的“蜜蜂舞蹈”最早由德国动物学家卡尔·冯·弗里施于20世纪70年代初作出解读。

structure.text: This so-called honeybee dance
was first interpreted
by German zoologist Karl von Frisch
in the early 1970s

difficult_points: so-called 表示“所谓的”，用来给前述飞行动作命名。
was interpreted 是被动语态，by 短语指出首次解读者。

sentences.sentence: To facilitate observation, von Frisch and his students built several glass walled hives and marked a collection of worker bees, or foragers, with paint.
sentences.translation: 为了便于观察，冯·弗里施和学生建造了几个玻璃壁蜂箱，并用颜料标记了一批工蜂，也就是觅食蜂。

structure.text: To facilitate observation
von Frisch and his students
built several glass walled hives
and marked a collection of worker bees, or foragers, with paint
or foragers

difficult_points: 句首不定式说明建蜂箱和标记工蜂的目的。
built 与 marked 是并列谓语；or foragers 是 worker bees 的同位说明。
原文 glass walled 未使用连字符，需原样保留。

sentences.sentence: He then trained those foragers to find nectar at designated sources at various distances from the hives, and when the bees returned he carefully recorded their movements, the angle and direction of their flight, and any additional visual cues offered to the colony.
sentences.translation: 随后，他训练这些觅食蜂到距蜂箱不同距离的指定地点寻找花蜜；蜜蜂返回后，他仔细记录它们的动作、飞行角度与方向，以及向蜂群提供的其他视觉线索。

structure.text: He then trained those foragers
to find nectar at designated sources at various distances from the hives
and when the bees returned
he carefully recorded their movements, the angle and direction of their flight, and any additional visual cues
offered to the colony

difficult_points: train somebody to do 表示训练某对象完成动作。
when 从句插在 and 后的第二个主句之前；recorded 后有三个并列宾语。
offered to the colony 后置修饰 visual cues。

sentences.sentence: What von Frisch discovered was that each aspect of the dance indicated certain details about the location of the nectar reserves and recruited others to return to the site.
sentences.translation: 冯·弗里施发现，舞蹈的每一个方面都传达了花蜜储备位置的某些细节，并招募其他蜜蜂返回该地点。

structure.text: What von Frisch discovered
was
that each aspect of the dance indicated certain details about the location of the nectar reserves and recruited others to return to the site

difficult_points: What 从句作主语，what 在从句中作 discovered 的宾语。
that 从句作表语；indicated 与 recruited 共用主语 each aspect of the dance。
语义上是舞蹈招募其他工蜂，原文用 each aspect 作 recruited 的语法主语，应依原文理解。

sentences.sentence: The first piece of information conveyed by dancing bees is the distance of the field to the hive, and they do this in one of three ways.
sentences.translation: 舞蹈蜂传达的第一项信息是食物地点与蜂箱之间的距离，它们会用三种方式之一来表达。

structure.text: The first piece of information
conveyed by dancing bees
is the distance of the field to the hive
and they do this in one of three ways

difficult_points: conveyed by ... 后置修饰 information。
they 指 dancing bees，do this 指传达距离信息。

sentences.sentence: If it is less than 50 meters from the colony's nest the bee will fly around in narrow circles, and then suddenly fly in the opposite direction.
sentences.translation: 如果食物距蜂群巢穴不足50米，蜜蜂会沿小圆圈盘旋，随后突然朝相反方向飞行。

structure.text: If it is less than 50 meters from the colony's nest
the bee
will fly around in narrow circles
and then suddenly fly in the opposite direction

difficult_points: it 指 the field/food source，If 从句说明距离条件。
第二个 fly 与第一个 fly 共用 will，省略了 will。

sentences.sentence: She will repeat this pattern, which von Frisch's team called the round dance, until she has recruited several other workers to return with her to the field.
sentences.translation: 它会重复这种模式；冯·弗里施的团队称之为“圆形舞”。这种重复会持续到它招募到另外几只工蜂随它返回食物地点。

structure.text: She will repeat this pattern
which von Frisch's team called the round dance
until she has recruited several other workers
to return with her to the field

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指 this pattern，call + 宾语 + 名称构成复合宾语。
until 从句说明重复动作持续到何时；recruit workers to do 表示招募工蜂完成动作。

sentences.sentence: When the distance is greater than 50 meters, but less than 150 meters, she will perform a sickle dance, a crescent shaped flight course.
sentences.translation: 当距离大于50米但小于150米时，它会跳“镰刀舞”，也就是沿新月形路线飞行。

structure.text: When the distance is greater than 50 meters, but less than 150 meters
she will perform a sickle dance
a crescent shaped flight course

difficult_points: greater than ... but less than ... 共同限定距离区间。
a crescent shaped flight course 与 a sickle dance 同位；原文 crescent shaped 未加连字符，必须保留。

sentences.sentence: If the field is farther than 150 meters, the forager will act out a waggle dance in which she will run straight ahead briefly before returning to her original position in a semi-circular movement.
sentences.translation: 如果食物地点在150米以外，觅食蜂就会跳“摇摆舞”：它先短暂直线向前跑，再以半圆形路线返回原位。

structure.text: If the field is farther than 150 meters
the forager will act out a waggle dance
in which she will run straight ahead briefly
before returning to her original position in a semi-circular movement

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句修饰 waggle dance，介词 in 被提前。
before 后接动名词 returning，逻辑主语是 she。

sentences.sentence: Then, she will run forward again and return from the opposite side.
sentences.translation: 然后，它会再次向前跑，并从另一侧返回。

structure.text: she
will run forward again
and return from the opposite side

difficult_points: run 和 return 共用主语 she 及助动词 will。
from the opposite side 与上一句半圆返回动作衔接，说明第二次从另一侧绕回。

sentences.sentence: The length of the forward run coincides with the distance of the food supplies; for example, a 2.5 second run indicates that the nectar was found about 2500 meters way.
sentences.translation: 向前直跑的持续时间与食物来源的距离相对应；例如，持续2.5秒的直跑表示花蜜是在约2500米处发现的。

structure.text: The length of the forward run
coincides with the distance of the food supplies
a 2.5 second run indicates
that the nectar was found about 2500 meters way

difficult_points: 分号连接规律陈述与具体例子；that 从句作 indicates 的宾语。
原文 2500 meters way 很可能缺少 a（away），但必须原样保留，语义按“约2500米远”理解。

sentences.sentence: Recruits also need to know the direction in which they should fly to arrive at the appropriate foraging location, and this information is communicated via the bee's angular orientation to the hive.
sentences.translation: 被招募的工蜂还需要知道应朝哪个方向飞，才能到达合适的觅食地点；这一信息通过舞蹈蜂相对于蜂箱的角度方向来传达。

structure.text: Recruits also need to know the direction
in which they should fly
to arrive at the appropriate foraging location
and this information is communicated
via the bee's angular orientation to the hive

difficult_points: in which 修饰 direction，介词 in 提前；to arrive 表示飞行目的。
this information 指方向信息，is communicated via ... 是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: It, however, is not a direct connection to the position of the food supplies from the hive, but its location relative to the sun.
sentences.translation: 然而，这并不是直接表示食物来源相对于蜂箱的位置，而是表示它相对于太阳的位置。

structure.text: It
however
is not a direct connection to the position of the food supplies from the hive
but its location relative to the sun

difficult_points: It 回指舞蹈蜂的角度方向；not A but B 表示不是直接对应蜂箱，而是对应太阳。
原文后半项省略 is a connection to，its 指 food supplies。

sentences.sentence: Therefore if the food is situated directly opposite from the sun, the bee will fly a straight run vertically downward; if it is in the same direction as the sun, it will fly directly upward from the colony nest.
sentences.translation: 因此，如果食物位于与太阳正相反的方向，蜜蜂会竖直向下直飞；如果食物与太阳同向，它就会从蜂巢处竖直向上飞。

structure.text: if the food is situated directly opposite from the sun
the bee will fly a straight run vertically downward
if it is in the same direction as the sun
it will fly directly upward from the colony nest

difficult_points: 分号连接两组平行的 if 条件句，分别对应食物与太阳反向和同向。
两处 it 都指 the food；fly downward/upward 描述舞蹈方向，而非实际觅食飞行。

sentences.sentence: A position 60 degrees to the right of the sun will prompt the bee to fly downwards at a 60 degrees angle toward the right of the nest.
sentences.translation: 若食物位于太阳右侧60度的位置，就会促使蜜蜂以向蜂巢右侧倾斜60度的角度向下飞。

structure.text: A position 60 degrees to the right of the sun
will prompt the bee
to fly downwards at a 60 degrees angle toward the right of the nest

difficult_points: prompt + 宾语 + to do 表示促使蜜蜂做出相应动作。
原文 a 60 degrees angle 在标准语法中通常写 a 60-degree angle，但需原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Moreover, because the sun is in constant motion throughout the day, the bee's orientation will shift depending on the time at which the dance is performed.
sentences.translation: 此外，由于太阳全天都在不断移动，蜜蜂的舞蹈方向会随舞蹈表演的时间而改变。

structure.text: because the sun is in constant motion throughout the day
the bee's orientation
will shift
depending on the time
at which the dance is performed

difficult_points: because 从句说明方向必须变化的原因。
depending on ... 表示变化依据；at which 修饰 time，介词 at 提前。

sentences.sentence: Sceptics of von Frisch's findings, however, claim that visual cues are not enough to provide all the clues necessary to convey the location of a food resource.
sentences.translation: 然而，对冯·弗里施研究结果持怀疑态度的人声称，仅靠视觉线索不足以提供传达食物来源位置所需的全部信息。

structure.text: Sceptics of von Frisch's findings
however
claim
that visual cues are not enough to provide all the clues necessary to convey the location of a food resource
necessary to convey the location of a food resource

difficult_points: that 从句作 claim 的宾语。
necessary ... 后置修饰 clues，不定式说明这些线索要完成的功能。

sentences.sentence: Several scientists, among them Adrian Wenner, believe that the dance is only one component of honeybee communications; odour is the second key element.
sentences.translation: 包括阿德里安·温纳在内的几位科学家认为，舞蹈只是蜜蜂交流的一个组成部分；气味才是第二个关键要素。

structure.text: Several scientists
among them Adrian Wenner
believe
that the dance is only one component of honeybee communications
odour is the second key element

difficult_points: among them Adrian Wenner 是插入语，列举 scientists 中的一员。
分号连接观点的两个部分：舞蹈只是其一，气味是另一关键要素。

sentences.sentence: Using robotic bees to perform the same dances, Wenner was unable to attract new recruits to the foraging activities; however, when he added a bit of nectar to the robot, workers quickly followed.
sentences.translation: 温纳使用机器蜂表演相同舞蹈，却无法吸引新的工蜂加入觅食；然而，当他给机器蜂加上一点花蜜后，工蜂很快便跟随而来。

structure.text: Using robotic bees to perform the same dances
Wenner was unable to attract new recruits to the foraging activities
when he added a bit of nectar to the robot
workers quickly followed

difficult_points: Using ... 的逻辑主语是 Wenner，说明实验手段。
分号后 however 引出对比结果；when 从句说明工蜂开始跟随的条件。

sentences.sentence: He also discovered that the odors must be representative of the actual flowers containing the food source; otherwise the bees will arrive at the site, but not know which ones will be profitable.
sentences.translation: 他还发现，气味必须能够代表实际含有食物来源的花朵；否则，蜜蜂虽然会到达该地点，却不知道哪些花朵值得采集。

structure.text: He also discovered
that the odors must be representative of the actual flowers containing the food source
containing the food source
otherwise the bees will arrive at the site
but not know
which ones will be profitable

difficult_points: that 从句作 discovered 的宾语；containing ... 修饰 flowers。
otherwise 表示如果气味不匹配实际花朵会发生的结果。
which ones 中 ones 指 flowers；profitable 在此指值得采蜜、能带来花蜜回报。原文 odors 使用美式拼写，须保留。
